title: Buggy Sets His Trap
description: On pages 9–12, buggy sets his trap focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.
scene: On pages 9–12, buggy sets his trap focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What! The rubble just slipped off of her!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: My, my. Wasn't that rather dangerous?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W... What was that just now...?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: My apologies but with your smooth skin,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: You should, of course, be unharmed,

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: My lovely lady alvida!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Alvida!? Where's alvida?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: He's calling me alvida!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Something seems a bit off though...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haha, so you've noticed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My body has changed since I ate a devil fruit!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: The name of my devil fruit is sube Sube fruit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There is no attack that can leave a wound on my beautiful skin anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: unfort- unlikely though,

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: The fruit did nothing to change my beauty...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But as you've pointed out, my freckles did indeed disappear!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: That's not what I was pointing out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In any case, if you're really fit to be my man,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then you certainly can't afford to lose to this man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've teamed up with him,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: exclusively for the purpose of finding you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ever since the day I was blasted away,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I tenaciously fought my way back to my crew, all the while wishing for the day when I would kill you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And what an adventure it was for I, who lacked a body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: An adventure of merriments, hellish dangers, and friendships! A most grand adventure for the little buggy! After much perseverance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wait, why the hell am I telling you all this for!?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Oh, it's just buggy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're still the same cheeky brat as ever, I see!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Make way for.... B! Buggy the clown!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: PIRAAATES!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: K'chick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you dare run away, fools!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Allow me to demonstrate to you my terror!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Guh!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: It's been awhile, rubber brat.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Is RORONOA ZORO doing fine as well?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Nicely done, Kabaji!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now then, I shall commence your public execution!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: gyahahahaha! You should consider it an honor to die in the same spot as the pirate King did!

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
